detail: After adding memory-viewers/viewer-api as a git submodule (github.com/mankinskin/viewer-api @ 47e0aa45, matching the root viewer-api pin), the full canonical frontend build `viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer` (trunk build --release --features profile-browser) succeeds with EXIT 0: "frontend built" + "frontend installed" to ~/.context-engine/static/ticket-viewer. This resolves the prior environment blocker (missing shared CSS assets / empty memory-viewers/viewer-api) and end-to-end validates the wasm build-regression fix. Browser verification is now unblocked.
